title: Europe's Airline Meltdown: Jet Fuel Crisis from Iran War
description: IEA warns 6 weeks of jet fuel left in Europe. KLM, Lufthansa, SAS slash flights. Brent >$100.

title: US-Iran Peace Talks Hit Impasse — Ceasefire Expires April 22
description: No date for second round of talks. Iran demands nuclear recognition. US demands Hormuz reopening. Oil at risk if talks fail.

title: Super Typhoon Sinlaku Batters Guam — Strongest of 2026
description: Category 5 Sinlaku with 278 km/h winds bore down on Guam and Northern Mariana Islands on April 14.

title: EU Renewables 2026: Solar & Wind Top Fossil Fuels First Time
description: Wind and solar hit 30% of EU power in 2025 — first time beating fossil fuels. Solar set a 369 TWh record. Portugal reached 80.7% renewable by Jan 2026.

title: Vance Heads to Pakistan for April 10 Iran Peace Talks
description: VP JD Vance travels to Islamabad April 10 for talks brokered by Pakistan. Agenda: permanent ceasefire, Lebanon, Hormuz, nuclear program, sanctions.

title: Oil Price Spike 2026: War Premium at the Pump
description: The Iran-US war has triggered the largest oil supply disruption in history. As of April 7, 2026: Brent crude $110.05/barrel, WTI $113.42. Iran announced a partial Hormuz reopening for Iraq on April 5, potentially releasing 3M bpd. OPEC+ agreed to a 206K bpd quota hike for May. JPMorgan warns $150+ if disruption persists past mid-May.

title: Pokémon Winds & Waves: New Core Games for Switch 2 — 30th Anniversary
description: Pokémon Winds and Waves revealed at Pokémon Day Presents as next core series for Switch 2. Plus Champions launches April 2026. Full 30th anniversary guide.

title: Portugal 2026: 33-Day 100% Renewable Streak — World Record
description: Portugal ran 100% renewable for 33 days in 2026 — a world record. How 80.7% solar-wind share inspired 12 nations to accelerate their clean energy plans.

title: COP31 Antalya 2026: The $1.3T Climate Finance Battle
description: COP31 meets Nov 9-20 in Antalya, 2026. The agenda: $1.3T climate finance and fossil fuel phase-out. 2025 ranked as the second-hottest year on record.

title: EU Locks In 90% Emissions Cut by 2040 in 2026 Climate Law
description: 145 countries backed the EU's legally binding 2040 climate law — the world's most ambitious target. The law mandates 90% greenhouse gas cuts and reshapes energy policy for 27 nations.

title: EU Climate & Clean Energy 2026: Laws, Records & COP31
description: Track EU's 90% emissions cut law, renewables beating fossil fuels, CBAM launch, and COP31 Antalya — the key climate milestones reshaping Europe and global policy in 2026.

title: China Economy Surges 6.3% in Early 2026 Despite War Risk
description: China industrial output surged 6.3% in Jan-Feb 2026 — its fastest growth since September — as AI exports and holiday spending surprised analysts despite Middle East war headwinds.

title: Nvidia Nemotron 3 Super: 5x Faster Agentic AI for Enterprise
description: Nvidia's 120B-param open model delivers 5x throughput on Blackwell GPUs, 1M context window, and native tool calling for enterprise AI agents.

title: Europa Ocean 2026: Webb Finds Life Clues on Jupiter's Moon
description: James Webb detected CO₂ across 100% of Europa's surface — likely from a hidden ocean below. Scientists say it raises the odds of life in our solar system.

title: NASA's 6.5-Hour Spacewalk Preps ISS Solar Arrays in 2026
description: Astronauts Jessica Meir and Chris Williams completed EVA #7 on March 18, 2026, installing the 7th of 8 new solar arrays. The $415M upgrade extends ISS operations before its 2030 deorbit.

title: Vietnam April 2026 Heatwave: Forecast, Heat Index and Health Guide
description: April 2026 brings severe heatwave to Vietnam — Northwest and Central regions hit hardest. Temperatures above multi-year average. Health advisories and power grid alerts.

title: Vietnam Cuts 3 Fuel Taxes to Zero: Petrol Now 24,332 VND/Liter
description: Vietnam's government simultaneously zeroed out three fuel taxes on March 27, dropping RON 95 petrol by 5,625 VND/liter as global oil prices spike.

title: Cuba Blackout Crisis 2026: 11 Million Without Power
description: Cuba plunged into island-wide blackout affecting 11 million people. Causes, humanitarian impact, and the worsening energy crisis in the Caribbean nation.

title: AI Data Centers Consume 1,000+ TWh in 2026 Power Crisis
description: Global AI data centers now top 1,000 TWh annually, straining US power grids in 2026. We break down who is consuming the most energy and what comes next.

title: Southeast Asia Energy Crisis: Hormuz Blockade Leaves Region Running on Fumes
description: Southeast Asia faces its worst energy crisis in decades as Iran Strait of Hormuz blockade chokes oil and gas supplies to nations dependent on foreign energy.

title: Smartphone Sales Face Record Crash in 2026
description: Global smartphone shipments set to fall 13% in 2026 as AI data centers devour memory chips, pushing average phone prices to record $523.

title: India Cuts Fuel Tax by Rs 10/L Amid Global Oil Crisis
description: India slashes excise duty on petrol to Rs 3/L and diesel to zero amid 50% oil price surge from Iran conflict. Govt absorbs Rs 1.55 lakh crore fiscal hit.

title: US-Iran War 2026: Military Strikes and Consequences
description: The United States launches military strikes on Iran in February 2026, triggering a regional war. Casualties, oil prices, and diplomacy in crisis.

title: US-Iran Conflict 2026: Middle East War Raises WWIII Fears
description: US-Israel strikes Feb 28, 2026 on Iranian nuclear facilities triggered retaliation and WWIII warnings. Oil, food, and financial markets in turmoil.
